value_chain_position: Neobank and cash-advance app targeting underbanked consumers; earns interchange and subscription fees; operates as a lending-adjacent digital banking layer.
relative_comps: Dave competes in the earned-wage-advance and neobank space against Chime, SoFi, and MoneyLion. Its 59% YoY revenue growth and 54% FCF margin are exceptional for a fintech this size, suggesting strong unit economics from its ExtraCash product. However, the revenue model is credit-adjacent (cash advances carry implicit credit risk), which pushes it toward the low end of the fintech_rails toll-taker definition. It is not a pure payments rail; it is a consumer credit product with a subscription wrapper. Load-bearing score reflects substitutability — consumers can switch to Chime or SoFi easily.
